_comment: Machine-readable registry of past hint/diagram issues. Used by audit_hint_diagrams.cjs and copilot agent for autonomous optimization.

issues.title: rect_find_height: volume value rendered as height dimension
issues.symptom: Box diagram shows absurdly tall box because ints[2] is the volume (e.g. 420), not the height
issues.root_cause: extractIntegers() returns [L, W, Volume] but code blindly uses ints[2] as height
issues.fix: parseVolumeDims() detects labelled dimensions from text; computes actual height = volume / (L*W) for proportional rendering

issues.title: Width label not clearly visible on isometric box
issues.symptom: Width label was plain text without arrow, easily missed on small boxes or distorted proportions
issues.root_cause: Only height had arrow markers; width was a bare text label at top-right edge
issues.fix: All 3 dimensions (長/寬/高) now have colour-coded arrow markers (blue/green/red) + enlarged font-size 12px

issues.title: Fraction addition word problems rendered as remainder bar chart
issues.symptom: Questions with 一共/合計/總共 show sequential consumption bar with ✂切 and 剩下 labels
issues.root_cause: fracWord L2 branch unconditionally calls buildFractionBarSVG() designed for fracRemain problems
issues.fix: Added isFracAddition/isFracSubtraction regex detection; renders step-by-step text for add/sub instead of bar/pie diagrams
issues.detection_regex: 一共|合計|總共|相加|加起來

issues.title: fracAdd branch shows overly complex multi-bar + comparison + merged bar SVG
issues.symptom: Multiple bar charts + comparison SVG + merged common-denominator bar is confusing for elementary students
issues.root_cause: L2 fracAdd branch rendered 3 separate SVG components in sequence
issues.fix: Replaced with simple text-based step format: 列式→通分→分子計算→約分

issues.title: Pure calculation problems rendered with unnecessary diagrams
issues.symptom: Bare arithmetic like '3/5 × 2/7 = ?' shows bar/pie diagrams instead of simple text steps
issues.root_cause: No detection of pure calculation context before rendering diagrams
issues.fix: isPureCalculation() detection skips diagrams for bare arithmetic; shows direct step-by-step text

issues.title: Composite volume height label showed wrong value
issues.symptom: Height label on composite box diagram displayed incorrect dimension value
issues.root_cause: Height label text was computed incorrectly for composite boxes
issues.fix: Fixed height label computation in buildIsometricBoxSVG

issues.title: 9 modules missing shared hint_engine.js integration
issues.symptom: volume-g5, decimal-unit4, fraction-g5, life-applications-g5, ratio-percent-g5, g5-grand-slam, midterm1, national-bank, commercial-pack1 had no 4-level visual scaffold
issues.root_cause: Modules only had local renderHint(text) functions without shared hint_engine.js
issues.fix: Wired all 9 modules: added <script src='../shared/hint_engine.js'></script>, setCurrentQuestion(q) on question change, init({moduleId}) at boot

issues.title: 24 question kinds unmapped to template families
issues.symptom: These kinds fell through to generic family, missing domain-specific L1-L4 scaffolds
issues.root_cause: KIND_TO_FAMILY and TEMPLATE_MAP only had 8 families covering 119 kinds
issues.fix: Added 5 new families (numberTheory, dataStats, geometry, placeValue, simpleEquation) with L1-L4 templates; mapped equivalent/simplify→fracAdd, cheng_increase→percent, division_application→average, large_numbers_comparison→placeValue

issues.title: Simple one-step decimal operations showed over-complex visual hints
issues.symptom: Single-expression decimal problems displayed number-line and place-value diagrams, causing cognitive overload and confusion.
issues.root_cause: L2/L3 decimal branch always rendered generic visual scaffolds without checking if problem type is simple one-step operation.
issues.fix: Added isSimpleDecimalOneStep() gate; for these kinds L2/L3 now use concise text-based operation + estimation + reverse-check prompts, no heavy diagrams.

anti_patterns.name: blind-ints-as-dimensions
anti_patterns.description: Using extractIntegers() output directly as length/width/height without checking question semantics
anti_patterns.check: Any volume question where ints[2] > ints[0] * ints[1] * 2 likely has volume in ints[2], not height
anti_patterns.fix_pattern: Use parseVolumeDims(text, kind) which checks labelled dimensions and reverse-solve context

anti_patterns.name: wrong-family-diagram
anti_patterns.description: Rendering a diagram designed for one problem type on a semantically different problem
anti_patterns.check: fracWord questions with addition keywords (一共/合計/總共) should NOT use buildFractionBarSVG remainder diagram
anti_patterns.fix_pattern: Check question text keywords before choosing diagram type

anti_patterns.name: label-without-arrow
anti_patterns.description: Dimension labels shown as bare text without arrow markers are easily missed
anti_patterns.check: All dimension labels in SVG should have colour-coded arrow markers parallel to the dimension edge
anti_patterns.fix_pattern: Use <line> with marker-start/marker-end for each dimension

anti_patterns.name: diagram-for-pure-calc
anti_patterns.description: Rendering complex diagrams for bare arithmetic expressions that need no visual aid
anti_patterns.check: If question text is pure calculation (no word problem context), use text-based steps
